planningOnlyJustification: Product-to-planning pass creates planning maturity artifacts only; runtime implementation remains governed by the full-delivery chain after planning maturity.

certification.notes: Planning artifacts are present. Status remains in_progress because transition guard blocked specs_hardened promotion; no implementation certification is claimed.

executionHistory.summary: Bootstrapped HTTP transport adapter spec to fill the E2E-testability + multi-frontend gap. Confirmed spec 061 already defines the TransportAdapter contract and the closed-vocabulary 'web' transport token; this spec adds the concrete HTTP adapter + bearer-authed POST /api/assistant/turn route plus E2E suite that drives the live stack without Telegram. 11 BDD scenarios (SCN-069-A01..A11) cover auth, disambig/confirm/reset round-trips, capture-as-fallback, golden wire-schema pinning, transport-hint vocabulary, rate limits, and the Telegram-free E2E suite.

Created design.md for the assistant HTTP transport, including POST /api/assistant/turn contract, request/response schemas, adapter foundation, auth/scope/rate/body/CORS behavior, observability, and scenario-to-test mapping. Routed implementation planning to bubbles.plan.

Created scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, report.md, and uservalidation.md for HTTP adapter contract, auth and limits, callback round trips, reset and capture rendering, and transport parity. Artifact lint passed; transition guard blocked specs_hardened promotion due current worktree source edits, unchecked implementation DoD, missing execution evidence, dependency and retro gates, and guard-required plan detail gaps.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.

Scope 2-4 split mirror of the Scope 1a precedent. Extended Scope 1 cross-spec ownership to cover every newly-deferred spec 068 scenario (SCN-068-A01, SCN-068-A02, SCN-068-A03, SCN-068-A04, SCN-068-A05, SCN-068-A09) in addition to existing SCN-068-A06/A07. Added 8 cross-spec e2e Test Plan rows pointing at the same tests/e2e/assistant/intent_*_test.go files spec 068 deferred, extended the Cross-spec ownership note and Scope 1 DoD checkbox accordingly, updated Scope Inventory row and Execution Outline validation checkpoint, and added 6 cross-spec scenario entries (crossSpecOriginSpec=068-structured-intent-compiler) plus matching traceabilityGuardScenarioIds entries in scenario-manifest.json. test-plan.json Scope 1 gained 8 cross-spec rows. uservalidation.md baseline checklist extended. Scenario IDs preserved verbatim; no inverse dependency added. No source code, tests, configs, ML, docs, or unrelated specs touched. workflowMode/ceiling/status unchanged.
